title: Ability to associate monday-storage records with an item
excerpt: Request to add the ability to associate a monday-storage record with an item ID. This way when said item is deleted, and eventually purged the monday-storage record will be purged with it. Otherwise we have to put item d…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request to add the ability to associate a monday-storage record with an item ID. This way when said item is deleted, and eventually purged the monday-storage record will be purged with it. Otherwise we have to put item delete webhooks in place, and delete records before the item is purged [even if restored the data is lost].

This would be more for monday’s sake really - to conserve storage. But when users delete an item, they probably expect related data to be deleted too.
